description_long: This is a tall, elegant floor lamp with a classic design, featuring a hexagonal, cream-colored fabric lampshade with subtle trim along the edges. The lampshade sits atop a slender, turned wooden stem that is richly stained and segmented with decorative rings. The base is round and sturdy, providing stability and complementing the traditional aesthetic. The lamp's overall appearance suggests it is designed for both functional lighting and decorative appeal, suitable for urban interiors or refined public spaces. The visible socket and harp at the top indicate it is intended for use with a standard bulb. The materials and craftsmanship evoke a timeless, vintage style often found in upscale homes, lobbies, or reading nooks.
description: A tall, classic floor lamp with a cream fabric hexagonal shade and a turned wooden stem, finished with a round base. Its traditional design and decorative details make it suitable for elegant urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full hexagonal lampshade and the detailed turned wooden stem with a round base.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side profile of the lampshade and the contours of the wooden stem.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the symmetry of the shade and the straight alignment of the stem.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view, emphasizing the other side of the lampshade and the decorative stem details.
